prestazioni: Engine swap to a Ford-Cosworth YB (2.0L 16V turbo, code: **BDT-E**) with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, ACL race bearings) and a Garrett GT35R turbo (0.82 A/R turbine housing) running 28 psi on E85 fuel, paired with a custom 4-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold (Schoech Racing) and a 3.5" straight-pipe exhaust with a MagnaFlow 14815 muffler for optimal spool and flow.

Full drivetrain reinforcement: Quaife ATB differential (CWP9Y-4020-AA) with 4.11:1 final drive ratio, uprated half-shafts (GKN Driveline), and a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (620mm, 400Nm torque capacity) with a billet flywheel (Spec Stage 3+).

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (specific to Capri Mk3 chassis, 8-position rebound, 24-position compression), polybushings (SuperPro SPF0116K) for the front A-arms, and a Whiteline KCA396 anti-roll bar kit (24mm front, 22mm rear) to eliminate body roll. Braking upgraded to AP Racing CP5210 calipers (4-piston front, 2-piston rear) with 330mm slotted rotors (DBA 4000 Series) and Ferodo DS2500 pads.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny widebody conversion (RB-CAPRI-MK3 kit) with custom carbon fiber overfenders (100mm wider front, 120mm wider rear), extended rocker panels, and a ducktail spoiler (Seibon Carbon) for downforce. Painted in Ford Motorsport Diamond White with contrasting Ford Racing Blue stripes (3M 2080 vinyl).

OEM+ interior with Recaro SRD-E seats (90s JDM-spec, bolt-in replacement for Capri shell) upholstered in black Alcantara with Ford Motorsport Blue stitching, paired with a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede) and a custom roll cage (Custom Cages UK, 8-point T45 steel, bolt-in design).

Lightweight 17x9" and 17x10.5" BBS RS-GT II wheels (ET20 front, ET15 rear) wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (245/40/17 front, 275/35/17 rear), with custom center caps featuring the original Capri RS "RS" logo. Front lip and rear diffuser by Maxton Design (MX-CAPRI-01) in raw carbon fiber.
